name: testing-bundle
description: Testing capability bundle v3.0.0: testing-bundle (router) + test-strategy-engineer (project-level strategy) + test-case-engineer (test case generation) + performance-test-engineer (performance testing) + bug-analyzer (bug root cause) + state-machine-test-engineer (state-machine-driven testing) + state-machine-testing MCP Server (optional enhancement). Use when user needs any testing capability.

interface.shortDescription: Test strategy, test case generation, performance testing, bug root cause, state-machine-driven testing, and testing workflows
interface.longDescription: Use this bundle for any testing capability: project-level test strategy, generating test cases from requirements, reviewing test cases, designing performance tests, analyzing bug root causes with 5 Whys and fishbone diagrams, or building state-machine models for stateful business objects (orders, approvals, tickets, membership).
